steps.title: Separate the clauses
steps.content: The text has two independent clauses: one identifies the Romanian artists as part of a Balchik-based group, and the next says this group is called the Balchik School. "Fittingly" is a transitional adverb, not a conjunction that can join clauses by itself.

steps.title: Avoid the comma splice
steps.content: Choice A fuses the clauses without punctuation. Choice B uses only commas around the transition, creating a comma splice. Choice D leaves "fittingly" awkwardly attached to the first sentence. The remaining choice ends the first clause with a period and starts the next sentence with the transition. The answer is C.
